title: useEffect
description: Side effects, cleanup, and the dependency array.

options: After React commits changes to the DOM
questions.explanation: That's why you can safely use the DOM in effects.

questions.prompt: How often does the effect run?
questions.explanation: Empty deps = mount only. StrictMode double-invokes in dev to check cleanup.

options: The component unmounts OR before the next effect run
questions.explanation: Cleanup lets you cancel subscriptions/timers cleanly.

options: Missing dep array — refetches on every render
questions.explanation: Add [] (or actual deps). Otherwise it's an infinite loop with each state update.

questions.prompt: Which is a bad use of useEffect?
options: Deriving state from props — do it in render instead
questions.explanation: Don't sync state to props with effects; compute in render.
useLayoutEffect runs synchronously after DOM changes, before paint.
